items.project_definition: The primary interface exposing v1 endpoints to handle requests and deliver structured responses.
A learning offering owned by an instructor, containing price in cents, visibility status, and sequential lessons.
The required mechanism for securing password credentials within the identity table.
A relationship between a student and a learning offering that tracks completion dates and percentage of progress.
The architectural decision to represent monetary values in cents to avoid floating-point precision errors.
The standardized lightweight data-interchange format used for all system responses via a specific envelope structure.
A child record representing a specific lesson or section maintained in a strict sequence.
The architectural style utilized for the network endpoints to ensure stateless communication.
A shared account identity incorporating a role field to differentiate between learners and content creators.
